reporter-output.line: Part 2 API Common group reached runtime after Core/Common prerequisites resolved.
IUT declares both /conf/datastream and /conf/api-common; full-class prerequisite is visible.
IUT declares both /conf/controlstream and /conf/api-common; full-class prerequisite is visible.
IUT declares both /conf/feasibility and /conf/controlstream; full-class prerequisite is visible.
Deployment SensorML representation source: direct Accept application/sml+json (http://cs-api-server:8080/deployments/c360.semconnect.systems.csapi.deployment.01)
Procedure SensorML representation source: direct Accept application/sml+json (http://cs-api-server:8080/procedures/c360.semconnect.systems.csapi.procedure.01)
Property SensorML representation source: direct Accept application/sml+json (http://cs-api-server:8080/properties/c360.semconnect.systems.csapi.property.air-temperature)
IUT declares /conf/system-event, /conf/api-common, and Part 1 /conf/system prerequisites.
IUT declares Part 2 /conf/advanced-filtering and its visible prerequisite classes.
SensorML representation source: direct Accept application/sml+json on selected system (http://cs-api-server:8080/systems/c360.semconnect.systems.csapi.system.01)

test.name: Conformance Classes - Core + SystemFeatures + Common + Subsystems + Procedures + Deployments + SamplingFeatures + PropertyDefinitions + Subdeployments + GeoJSON + SensorML + AdvancedFiltering + CreateReplaceDelete + Update + Part2ApiCommon + Part2Datastream + Part2ControlStream + Part2Feasibility + Part2SystemEvent + Part2AdvancedFiltering (OGC 23-001 /conf/core, /conf/system, /conf/subsystem, /conf/procedure, /conf/deployment, /conf/sf, /conf/property, /conf/subdeployment, /conf/geojson, /conf/sensorml, /conf/advanced-filtering, /conf/create-replace-delete, /conf/update; OGC 23-002 /conf/api-common, /conf/datastream, /conf/controlstream, /conf/feasibility, /conf/system-event, /conf/advanced-filtering; OGC 19-072 /conf/common)

test-method.name: deploymentSensorMlHasSchemaAndMapping
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/sensorml/deployment-schema and http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/sensorml/deployment-mappings: deployment SensorML JSON has Deployment shape, identity mapping, and deployedSystems evidence after /conf/deployment gating (REQ-ETS-PART1-013, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-013-SENSORML-DEPLOYMENT-SCHEMA-MAPPING-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-013-SENSORML-NON-SYSTEM-FALLBACK-HONESTY-001)

reporter-output.line: Deployment SensorML representation source: direct Accept application/sml+json (http://cs-api-server:8080/deployments/c360.semconnect.systems.csapi.deployment.01)

test-method.name: procedureSensorMlHasSchemaAndMapping
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/sensorml/procedure-schema, http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/sensorml/procedure-sml-class and http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/sensorml/procedure-mappings: procedure SensorML JSON has procedure-compatible type, identity mapping, and non-identity process structure after /conf/procedure gating (REQ-ETS-PART1-013, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-013-SENSORML-PROCEDURE-SCHEMA-MAPPING-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-013-SENSORML-NON-SYSTEM-FALLBACK-HONESTY-001)

reporter-output.line: Procedure SensorML representation source: direct Accept application/sml+json (http://cs-api-server:8080/procedures/c360.semconnect.systems.csapi.procedure.01)

test-method.name: propertySensorMlHasSchemaAndMapping
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/sensorml/property-schema and http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/sensorml/property-mappings: property SensorML JSON has property-compatible shape and mapping evidence after /conf/property gating, with empty /properties SKIP honesty (REQ-ETS-PART1-013, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-013-SENSORML-PROPERTY-SCHEMA-MAPPING-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-013-SENSORML-NON-SYSTEM-FALLBACK-HONESTY-001)

reporter-output.line: Property SensorML representation source: direct Accept application/sml+json (http://cs-api-server:8080/properties/c360.semconnect.systems.csapi.property.air-temperature)

test-method.name: sensorMlDeploymentLinksMemberAssociationRelsUseResourceSpecificNames
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/sensorml/relation-types: SensorML deployment links-member association rels use deployment-specific names and absent links SKIP honestly (REQ-ETS-PART1-013, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-013-SENSORML-RELATION-TYPES-BREADTH-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-013-RELATION-TYPES-FALLBACK-HONESTY-001)

test-method.name: sensorMlDependencyCascadeRuntime
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/sensorml: SensorML group runtime-cascade tracer for SensorML -> SystemFeatures -> Core (REQ-ETS-PART1-013, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-013-SENSORML-DEPENDENCY-SMOKE-001)

test-method.name: sensorMlConformanceDeclared
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/sensorml: /conformance declares /conf/sensorml (REQ-ETS-PART1-013, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-013-SENSORML-CONFORMANCE-DECLARED-001)

test-method.name: sensorMlMediaTypeWriteParsesSystemBodyWhenMutationEnabled
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/sensorml/mediatype-write: Content-Type application/sml+json write parsing is checked only after CRD conformance, explicit dedicated-mutable-IUT opt-in, public-IUT hard denial, and follow-up dereference evidence (REQ-ETS-PART1-013, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-013-SENSORML-MEDIATYPE-WRITE-SAFETY-GATED-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-013-MEDIATYPE-WRITE-NO-PUBLIC-MUTATION-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-013-MEDIATYPE-WRITE-PARSE-EVIDENCE-001)

test-method.name: sensorMlProcedureLinksMemberAssociationRelsUseResourceSpecificNames
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/sensorml/relation-types: SensorML procedure links-member association rels use procedure-specific names and absent links SKIP honestly (REQ-ETS-PART1-013, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-013-SENSORML-RELATION-TYPES-BREADTH-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-013-RELATION-TYPES-FALLBACK-HONESTY-001)

test-method.name: sensorMlRepresentationDiscoveredForSystem
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/sensorml/mediatype-read: discover a system SensorML representation through direct negotiation or an explicit application/sml+json alternate link; CS API items wrapper alone does not PASS (REQ-ETS-PART1-013, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-013-SENSORML-REPRESENTATION-DISCOVERY-001)

test-method.name: sensorMlMediaTypeRead
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/sensorml/mediatype-read: fetch selected SensorML representation and record direct Accept versus alternate-link fallback without claiming full mediatype-read closure from generic JSON (REQ-ETS-PART1-013, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-013-SENSORML-MEDIATYPE-READ-001)

reporter-output.line: SensorML representation source: direct Accept application/sml+json on selected system (http://cs-api-server:8080/systems/c360.semconnect.systems.csapi.system.01)

test-method.name: sensorMlLinksMemberAssociationRelsUseResourceSpecificNames
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/sensorml/relation-types: SensorML system links-member association rels use resource-specific association names, excluding generic representation links and non-links-member associations (REQ-ETS-PART1-013, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-013-SENSORML-RELATION-TYPES-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-013-SENSORML-RELATION-TYPES-BREADTH-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-013-RELATION-TYPES-FALLBACK-HONESTY-001)

test-method.name: sensorMlSystemHasMinimalShape
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/sensorml/system-sml-class: SensorML system representation has minimal SensorML class and identity shape (REQ-ETS-PART1-013, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-013-SENSORML-SYSTEM-SHAPE-001)

test-method.name: sensorMlSystemPreservesIdentityMapping
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/sensorml/system-mappings: SensorML system representation preserves selected CS API system identity through id or UID mapping (REQ-ETS-PART1-013, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-013-SENSORML-SYSTEM-MAPPING-001)

test-method.name: deploymentFeatureHasGeoJsonSchemaAndMapping
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/geojson/deployment-schema and http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/geojson/deployment-mappings: /deployments GeoJSON FeatureCollection exposes deployment-specific properties before PASS (REQ-ETS-PART1-012, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-GEOJSON-DEPLOYMENT-SCHEMA-MAPPING-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-GEOJSON-NON-SYSTEM-FALLBACK-HONESTY-001)

test-method.name: geoJsonDependencyCascadeRuntime
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/geojson: GeoJSON group runtime-cascade tracer for GeoJSON → SystemFeatures → Core (REQ-ETS-PART1-012, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-GEOJSON-DEPENDENCY-SMOKE-001)

test-method.name: geoJsonDeploymentLinksMemberAssociationRelsUseResourceSpecificNames
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/geojson/relation-types: deployment links-member association rels use deployment-specific names and generic/property-level links do not create PASS (REQ-ETS-PART1-012, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-GEOJSON-RELATION-TYPES-BREADTH-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-013-RELATION-TYPES-FALLBACK-HONESTY-001)

test-method.name: geoJsonConformanceDeclared
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/geojson: /conformance declares /conf/geojson (REQ-ETS-PART1-012, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-GEOJSON-CONFORMANCE-DECLARED-001)

test-method.name: geoJsonMediaTypeWriteParsesSystemBodyWhenMutationEnabled
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/geojson/mediatype-write: Content-Type application/geo+json write parsing is checked only after CRD conformance, explicit dedicated-mutable-IUT opt-in, public-IUT hard denial, and follow-up dereference evidence (REQ-ETS-PART1-012, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-GEOJSON-MEDIATYPE-WRITE-SAFETY-GATED-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-013-MEDIATYPE-WRITE-NO-PUBLIC-MUTATION-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-013-MEDIATYPE-WRITE-PARSE-EVIDENCE-001)

test-method.name: geoJsonLinksMemberAssociationRelsUseResourceSpecificNames
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/geojson/relation-types: system links-member association rels use resource-specific association names, excluding canonical/alternate/property-level links (REQ-ETS-PART1-012, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-GEOJSON-RELATION-TYPES-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-GEOJSON-RELATION-TYPES-BREADTH-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-013-RELATION-TYPES-FALLBACK-HONESTY-001)

test-method.name: geoJsonMediaTypeRead
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/geojson/mediatype-read: GET /systems with Accept application/geo+json returns HTTP 200 and parseable JSON, with fallback honesty when the media type is application/json (REQ-ETS-PART1-012, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-GEOJSON-MEDIATYPE-READ-001)

test-method.name: geoJsonProcedureLinksMemberAssociationRelsUseResourceSpecificNames
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/geojson/relation-types: procedure links-member association rels use procedure-specific names and generic links do not create PASS (REQ-ETS-PART1-012, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-GEOJSON-RELATION-TYPES-BREADTH-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-013-RELATION-TYPES-FALLBACK-HONESTY-001)

test-method.name: geoJsonSamplingFeatureLinksMemberAssociationRelsUseResourceSpecificNames
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/geojson/relation-types: samplingFeature links-member association rels use samplingFeature-specific names and property-level links do not create PASS (REQ-ETS-PART1-012, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-GEOJSON-RELATION-TYPES-BREADTH-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-013-RELATION-TYPES-FALLBACK-HONESTY-001)

test-method.name: procedureFeatureHasGeoJsonSchemaAndMapping
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/geojson/procedure-schema and http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/geojson/procedure-mappings: /procedures GeoJSON FeatureCollection exposes procedure-specific null geometry and featureType before PASS (REQ-ETS-PART1-012, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-GEOJSON-PROCEDURE-SCHEMA-MAPPING-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-GEOJSON-NON-SYSTEM-FALLBACK-HONESTY-001)

test-method.name: samplingFeatureHasGeoJsonSchemaAndMapping
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/geojson/sf-schema and http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/geojson/sf-mappings: /samplingFeatures GeoJSON FeatureCollection exposes sampling-feature-specific properties before PASS (REQ-ETS-PART1-012, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-GEOJSON-SF-SCHEMA-MAPPING-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-GEOJSON-NON-SYSTEM-FALLBACK-HONESTY-001)

test-method.name: systemsCollectionIsGeoJsonFeatureCollection
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/geojson/system-schema: /systems GeoJSON response is type=FeatureCollection with a features array; CS API items wrapper alone does not PASS (REQ-ETS-PART1-012, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-GEOJSON-FEATURECOLLECTION-001)

test-method.name: systemFeatureHasGeoJsonShapeAndProperties
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/geojson/system-mappings: first system feature has GeoJSON Feature shape and CS API attributes under properties (REQ-ETS-PART1-012, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-012-GEOJSON-FEATURE-MAPPING-001)

test-method.name: propertiesCollectionReturns200
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/property/resources-endpoint: GET /properties returns HTTP 200 + items array (may be empty per IUT state) (REQ-ETS-PART1-008, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-008-PROP-RESOURCES-001)

test-method.name: propertyDefinitionsDependencyCascadeRuntime
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 group-dependency cascade: propertydefinitions depends-on systemfeatures (REQ-ETS-PART1-008, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-008-PROP-DEPENDENCY-SKIP-001)

test-method.name: propertyItemHasIdType
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/property/canonical-endpoint: GET /properties/{id} has id+type per canonical-endpoint shape (REQ-ETS-PART1-008, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-008-PROP-CANONICAL-001)

test-method.name: propertyCanonicalUrlReturns200
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/property/canonical-url: /properties/{id} returns HTTP 200 at canonical URL (REQ-ETS-PART1-008, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-008-PROP-CANONICAL-URL-001)

test-method.name: controlStreamScopedFeasibilityEndpointUsesNormativeSingularPath
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/feasibility/ref-from-controlstream: ControlStream-scoped Feasibility endpoint uses the normative singular /controlstream/{csId}/feasibility path without POSTing (REQ-ETS-PART2-004, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-004-FEASIBILITY-ENDPOINT-SAFETY-001)

test-method.name: feasibilityCanonicalResourceReadableWhenAvailable
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/feasibility/canonical-url: actual Feasibility resource is readable at /feasibility/{id} before canonical URL PASS (REQ-ETS-PART2-004, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-004-FEASIBILITY-RESOURCE-CLOSURE-001)

test-method.name: feasibilityCollectionsCheckedWhenAdvertised
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/feasibility/collections: Feasibility collections are checked only when advertised with itemType=Feasibility (REQ-ETS-PART2-004, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-004-FEASIBILITY-COLLECTIONS-001)

test-method.name: feasibilityConformanceDeclared
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/feasibility: /conformance declares /conf/feasibility before Command Feasibility assertions run (REQ-ETS-PART2-004, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-004-FEASIBILITY-CONFORMANCE-DECLARED-001)

test-method.name: feasibilityResultEndpointReadableWhenResourceAvailable
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/feasibility/result-endpoint: actual Feasibility resource exposes a readable /result endpoint when resource evidence exists (REQ-ETS-PART2-004, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-004-FEASIBILITY-RESOURCE-CLOSURE-001)

test-method.name: feasibilityControlStreamPrerequisiteVisibleForFullClosure
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/feasibility: full /conf/feasibility closure is prerequisite-incomplete when /conf/controlstream is absent (REQ-ETS-PART2-004, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-004-DEPENDENCY-SKIP-001)

reporter-output.line: IUT declares both /conf/feasibility and /conf/controlstream; full-class prerequisite is visible.

test-method.name: feasibilityStatusEndpointReadableWhenResourceAvailable
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/feasibility/status-endpoint: actual Feasibility resource exposes a readable /status endpoint when resource evidence exists (REQ-ETS-PART2-004, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-004-FEASIBILITY-RESOURCE-CLOSURE-001)

test-method.name: subsystemsCollectionReturns200
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/subsystem/collection: GET /systems/{parentId}/subsystems returns HTTP 200 + non-empty items array (REQ-ETS-PART1-003, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-003-SUBSYSTEMS-RESOURCES-001)

test-method.name: subsystemItemHasIdTypeLinks
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/system/canonical-endpoint: GET /systems/{parentId}/subsystems/{id} has id+type+links per inherited canonical-endpoint shape (REQ-ETS-PART1-003, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-003-SUBSYSTEMS-CANONICAL-001)

test-method.name: subsystemHasParentSystemLink
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/subsystem: /systems/{parentId}/subsystems/{id} links contain rel=parent referencing parent system (REQ-ETS-PART1-003, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-003-SUBSYSTEMS-PARENT-LINK-001 — UNIQUE-to-Subsystems architectural invariant)

test-method.name: subsystemItemHasCanonicalLink
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/system/canonical-url: /systems/{parentId}/subsystems/{id} links contain rel=canonical (REQ-ETS-PART1-003, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-003-SUBSYSTEMS-CANONICAL-URL-001 — preserves v1.0 GH#3 fix)

test-method.name: proceduresCollectionReturns200
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/procedure/resources-endpoint: GET /procedures returns HTTP 200 + non-empty items array (REQ-ETS-PART1-006, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-006-PROCEDURES-RESOURCES-001)

test-method.name: procedureItemHasIdTypeLinks
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/procedure/canonical-endpoint: GET /procedures/{id} has id+type+links per canonical-endpoint shape (REQ-ETS-PART1-006, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-006-PROCEDURES-CANONICAL-001)

test-method.name: procedureItemsHaveNoGeometry
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/procedure/location: every /procedures item has geometry=null (Procedure SHALL NOT include geometry) (REQ-ETS-PART1-006, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-006-PROCEDURES-LOCATION-001 — UNIQUE-to-Procedures)

test-method.name: procedureItemHasCanonicalLink
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/procedure/canonical-url: /procedures/{id} links contain rel=canonical (REQ-ETS-PART1-006, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-006-PROCEDURES-CANONICAL-URL-001)

test-method.name: landingPageReturnsHttp200
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/landing-page/root-success: landing page (GET /) returns HTTP 200 (REQ-ETS-CORE-002, SCENARIO-ETS-CORE-LANDING-001)

test-method.name: landingPageReturnsJson
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/landing-page/root-success: landing page body is parseable JSON (REQ-ETS-CORE-002, SCENARIO-ETS-CORE-LANDING-001)

test-method.name: landingPageHasLinks
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/landing-page/root-success: landing page body has a links array (REQ-ETS-CORE-002, SCENARIO-ETS-CORE-LANDING-001)

test-method.name: landingPageDoesNotRequireSelfRel
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/landing-page/root-success: landing page does NOT require rel=self (sentinel — preserves v1.0 GH#3 fix; SCENARIO-ETS-CORE-LINKS-NORMATIVE-001)

test-method.name: landingPageHasConformanceLink
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/landing-page/conformance-success: landing page links contain rel=conformance (REQ-ETS-CORE-002, SCENARIO-ETS-CORE-LANDING-001)

test-method.name: landingPageHasApiDefinitionLink
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/landing-page/api-definition-success: landing page links contain rel=service-desc OR rel=service-doc (REQ-ETS-CORE-002, SCENARIO-ETS-CORE-API-DEF-FALLBACK-001)

test-method.name: commandFiltersVerifyReturnedPredicatesWhenEndpointAvailable
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/advanced-filtering/cmd-by-issuetime, http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/advanced-filtering/cmd-by-exectime, http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/advanced-filtering/cmd-by-status, and http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/advanced-filtering/cmd-by-sender: Command filters are read-only and checked only when /commands is available with seed evidence (REQ-ETS-PART2-006, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-006-COMMAND-FILTERS-READONLY-001)

test-method.name: advancedFilteringPrerequisitesVisibleForFullClosure
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/advanced-filtering: full /conf/advanced-filtering closure is prerequisite-incomplete when /conf/api-common or Part 1 /conf/advanced-filtering is absent (REQ-ETS-PART2-006, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-006-DEPENDENCY-SKIP-001)

reporter-output.line: IUT declares Part 2 /conf/advanced-filtering and its visible prerequisite classes.

test-method.name: controlStreamControlledPropertyFilterVerifiesReturnedPredicates
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/advanced-filtering/controlstream-by-controlprop: ControlStream controlledProperty filter returns only ControlStreams with matching controlled property evidence (REQ-ETS-PART2-006, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-006-CONTROLSTREAM-FILTERS-READONLY-001)

test-method.name: controlStreamTimeFiltersVerifyReturnedPredicates
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/advanced-filtering/controlstream-by-issuetime and http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/advanced-filtering/controlstream-by-exectime: ControlStream time filters are read-only and returned resources intersect the requested time value (REQ-ETS-PART2-006, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-006-CONTROLSTREAM-FILTERS-READONLY-001)

test-method.name: datastreamObservedPropertyFilterVerifiesReturnedPredicates
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/advanced-filtering/datastream-by-obsprop: DataStream observedProperty filter returns only DataStreams with matching observed property evidence (REQ-ETS-PART2-006, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-006-DATASTREAM-FILTERS-READONLY-001)

test-method.name: datastreamTimeFiltersVerifyReturnedPredicates
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/advanced-filtering/datastream-by-phenomenontime and http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/advanced-filtering/datastream-by-resulttime: DataStream time filters are read-only and returned resources intersect the requested time value (REQ-ETS-PART2-006, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-006-DATASTREAM-FILTERS-READONLY-001)

test-method.name: observationTimeFiltersVerifyReturnedPredicates
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/advanced-filtering/obs-by-phenomenontime and http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/advanced-filtering/obs-by-resulttime: Observation time filters are read-only and returned Observations intersect the requested time value (REQ-ETS-PART2-006, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-006-OBSERVATION-FILTERS-READONLY-001)

test-method.name: systemEventTypeFilterVerifiesReturnedPredicatesWhenEndpointAvailable
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/advanced-filtering/event-by-type: SystemEvent eventType filter is checked only when JSON SystemEvent endpoints are available with event type evidence (REQ-ETS-PART2-006, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-006-SYSTEM-EVENT-FILTER-READONLY-001)

test-method.name: part2AdvancedFilteringConformanceDeclared
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/advanced-filtering: /conformance declares /conf/advanced-filtering before Part 2 Advanced Filtering assertions run (REQ-ETS-PART2-006, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-006-ADVFILTER-CONFORMANCE-DECLARED-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-006-UNDECLARED-FILTER-HONESTY-001)

test-method.name: commandsReferenceSelectedControlStreamWhenNestedCollectionPopulated
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/controlstream/cmd-ref-from-controlstream: ControlStream-scoped Command resources provide reference evidence when populated (REQ-ETS-PART2-003, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-003-COMMAND-REFERENCE-EVIDENCE-001)

test-method.name: controlStreamApiCommonPrerequisiteVisibleForFullClosure
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/controlstream: full /conf/controlstream closure is prerequisite-incomplete when /conf/api-common is absent (REQ-ETS-PART2-003, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-003-DEPENDENCY-SKIP-001)

reporter-output.line: IUT declares both /conf/controlstream and /conf/api-common; full-class prerequisite is visible.

test-method.name: controlStreamCanonicalUrlReadableWhenControlsPathAvailable
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/controlstream/canonical-url: /controls/{id} canonical URL is verified only when that canonical path is readable (REQ-ETS-PART2-003, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-003-CONTROLSTREAM-CANONICAL-URL-EVIDENCE-001)

test-method.name: controlStreamResourceReadableViaObservedEndpoint
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/controlstream/canonical-endpoint: selected ControlStream is readable through observed /controlstreams/{id} endpoint (REQ-ETS-PART2-003, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-003-CONTROLSTREAM-ITEM-READONLY-001)

test-method.name: controlStreamConformanceDeclared
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/controlstream: /conformance declares /conf/controlstream before ControlStream assertions run (REQ-ETS-PART2-003, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-003-CONTROLSTREAM-CONFORMANCE-DECLARED-001)

test-method.name: controlStreamSchemaReadable
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/controlstream/schema-op: selected ControlStream exposes a readable /schema sub-resource (REQ-ETS-PART2-003, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-003-CONTROLSTREAM-SCHEMA-ENDPOINT-001)

test-method.name: controlStreamScopedCommandsReadable
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/controlstream/cmd-resources-endpoint: /controlstreams/{id}/commands is a readable JSON endpoint collection (REQ-ETS-PART2-003, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-003-COMMAND-ENDPOINTS-READONLY-001)

test-method.name: globalCommandsEndpointReadableWhenAvailable
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/controlstream/cmd-canonical-endpoint: /commands canonical endpoint is readable when provided by the IUT (REQ-ETS-PART2-003, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-003-COMMAND-ENDPOINTS-READONLY-001)

test-method.name: controlStreamsCollectionReadable
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/controlstream/resources-endpoint: /controlstreams is a readable JSON resource collection (REQ-ETS-PART2-003, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-003-CONTROLSTREAM-COLLECTION-READONLY-001)

test-method.name: controlStreamsEndpointExposesControlStreamItems
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/controlstream/canonical-endpoint: /controlstreams endpoint exposes ControlStream resources (REQ-ETS-PART2-003, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-003-CONTROLSTREAM-COLLECTION-READONLY-001)

test-method.name: systemScopedControlStreamsReadableWhenSystemReferencePresent
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/controlstream/ref-from-system: selected ControlStream's parent System exposes a ControlStream sub-resource collection (REQ-ETS-PART2-003, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-003-SYSTEM-REFERENCE-READONLY-001)

test-method.name: samplingFeaturesCollectionReturns200
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/sf/resources-endpoint: GET /samplingFeatures returns HTTP 200 + non-empty items array (REQ-ETS-PART1-007, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-007-SF-RESOURCES-001)

test-method.name: samplingFeaturesDependencyCascadeRuntime
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 group-dependency cascade: samplingfeatures depends-on systemfeatures (REQ-ETS-PART1-007, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-007-SF-DEPENDENCY-SKIP-001)

test-method.name: samplingFeatureItemHasIdType
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/sf/canonical-endpoint: GET /samplingFeatures/{id} has id+type per canonical-endpoint shape (REQ-ETS-PART1-007, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-007-SF-CANONICAL-001)

test-method.name: samplingFeatureCanonicalUrlReturns200
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/sf/canonical-url: /samplingFeatures/{id} returns HTTP 200 at canonical URL (REQ-ETS-PART1-007, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-007-SF-CANONICAL-URL-001)

test-method.name: subdeploymentsCollectionReturns200
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/subdeployment/collection: GET /deployments/{parentId}/subdeployments returns HTTP 200 + non-empty items array (REQ-ETS-PART1-005, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-005-SUBDEP-RESOURCES-001)

test-method.name: subdeploymentItemHasIdTypeLinks
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/deployment/canonical-endpoint: GET /deployments/{id} (canonical endpoint, INHERITED from /req/deployment) has id+type+links per inherited canonical-endpoint shape (REQ-ETS-PART1-005, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-005-SUBDEP-CANONICAL-001)

test-method.name: subdeploymentsDependencyCascadeRuntime
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/subdeployment: Subdeployments group runtime-cascade tracer for 3-deep chain Subdeployments → Deployments → SystemFeatures → Core (REQ-ETS-PART1-005, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-005-SUBDEP-DEPENDENCY-SKIP-001 — UNIQUE-to-Subdeployments)

test-method.name: subdeploymentItemHasCanonicalLink
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/deployment/canonical-url: /deployments/{id} links contain rel=canonical (INHERITED from /req/deployment) (REQ-ETS-PART1-005, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-005-SUBDEP-CANONICAL-URL-001)

test-method.name: systemsFilterByGeomSmoke
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/advanced-filtering/feature-by-geom: /systems?geom=<broad-WKT-polygon> returns HTTP 200 JSON collection shape; this is smoke, not full spatial-intersection conformance (REQ-ETS-PART1-009, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-009-ADVFILTER-SYSTEM-GEOM-SMOKE-001)

test-method.name: advancedFilteringIdListSchema
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/advanced-filtering/id-list-schema: local ID_List helper accepts homogeneous local-ID or UID lists and rejects empty, malformed, or mixed lists (REQ-ETS-PART1-009, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-009-ADVFILTER-ID-LIST-SCHEMA-001)

test-method.name: advancedFilteringDependencyCascadeRuntime
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/advanced-filtering: AdvancedFiltering group runtime-cascade tracer for AdvancedFiltering -> SystemFeatures -> Core (REQ-ETS-PART1-009, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-009-ADVFILTER-DEPENDENCY-SMOKE-001)

test-method.name: advancedFilteringConformanceDeclared
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/advanced-filtering: /conformance declares /conf/advanced-filtering (REQ-ETS-PART1-009, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-009-ADVFILTER-CONFORMANCE-DECLARED-001)

test-method.name: systemsFilterById
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/advanced-filtering/resource-by-id: /systems?id=<seed-id> returns non-empty results and every result preserves the seed id (REQ-ETS-PART1-009, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-009-ADVFILTER-SYSTEM-ID-001)

test-method.name: systemsFilterByKeyword
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/advanced-filtering/resource-by-keyword: /systems?q=<seed-keyword> returns non-empty results with keyword evidence in name or description (REQ-ETS-PART1-009, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-009-ADVFILTER-SYSTEM-KEYWORD-001)

test-method.name: conformancePageReturnsJson
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/landing-page/conformance-success: /conformance body is parseable JSON (REQ-ETS-CORE-003, SCENARIO-ETS-CORE-CONFORMANCE-001)

test-method.name: conformancePageReturnsHttp200
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/landing-page/conformance-success: GET /conformance returns HTTP 200 (REQ-ETS-CORE-003, SCENARIO-ETS-CORE-CONFORMANCE-001)

test-method.name: conformancePageHasConformsToArray
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/landing-page/conformance-success: /conformance body has non-empty conformsTo array, captured into suite context (REQ-ETS-CORE-003, SCENARIO-ETS-CORE-CONFORMANCE-001)

test-method.name: conformancePageDeclaresCsCore
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/conf/core: /conformance declares the CS API Core conformance class URI (REQ-ETS-CORE-003)

test-method.name: createReplaceDeleteConformanceDeclared
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/create-replace-delete: /conformance declares /conf/create-replace-delete (REQ-ETS-PART1-010, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-010-CRD-CONFORMANCE-DECLARED-001)

test-method.name: createReplaceDeleteDependencyCascadeRuntime
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/create-replace-delete: CreateReplaceDelete group runtime-cascade tracer for CreateReplaceDelete -> SystemFeatures -> Core (REQ-ETS-PART1-010, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-010-CRD-DEPENDENCY-SMOKE-001)

test-method.name: systemResourceOptionsReadinessPrecondition
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/create-replace-delete/system: OPTIONS /systems/{systemId} advertises PUT and DELETE readiness; readiness-only, not lifecycle conformance PASS (REQ-ETS-PART1-010, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-010-CRD-SYSTEM-RESOURCE-OPTIONS-001)

test-method.name: createReplaceDeleteMutationSafetyGate
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/create-replace-delete: mutation lifecycle tests are blocked unless mutation-tests-enabled=true and mutation-iut-policy=dedicated-mutable-iut (REQ-ETS-PART1-010, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-010-CRD-MUTATION-SAFETY-GATE-001)

test-method.name: systemsCollectionOptionsReadinessPrecondition
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/create-replace-delete/system: OPTIONS /systems advertises POST readiness; readiness-only, not lifecycle conformance PASS (REQ-ETS-PART1-010, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-010-CRD-SYSTEMS-OPTIONS-001)

test-method.name: systemsCreateReplaceDeleteLifecycle
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/create-replace-delete/system: when explicitly enabled against a dedicated mutable IUT, POST/PUT/DELETE a temporary system resource (REQ-ETS-PART1-010, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-010-CRD-SYSTEM-LIFECYCLE-OPTIN-001)

test-method.name: deploymentsCollectionReturns200
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/deployment/resources-endpoint: GET /deployments returns HTTP 200 + non-empty items array (REQ-ETS-PART1-004, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-004-DEPLOYMENTS-RESOURCES-001)

test-method.name: deploymentDeployedSystemEncodingDeclared
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/deployment/deployed-system-resource: IUT /conformance declares at least one encoding class providing DeployedSystem representation (REQ-ETS-PART1-004, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-004-DEPLOYMENTS-DEPLOYED-SYSTEM-001 — UNIQUE-to-Deployments)

test-method.name: deploymentItemHasIdTypeLinks
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/deployment/canonical-endpoint: GET /deployments/{id} has id+type+links per canonical-endpoint shape (REQ-ETS-PART1-004, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-004-DEPLOYMENTS-CANONICAL-001)

test-method.name: deploymentItemHasCanonicalLink
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/deployment/canonical-url: /deployments/{id} links contain rel=canonical (REQ-ETS-PART1-004, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-004-DEPLOYMENTS-CANONICAL-URL-001)

test-method.name: systemEventCanonicalResourceReadableWhenAvailable
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/system-event/canonical-url: actual SystemEvent resource is readable at /systemEvents/{id} before canonical URL PASS (REQ-ETS-PART2-005, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-005-SYSTEM-EVENT-RESOURCE-CLOSURE-001)

test-method.name: systemEventCollectionsCheckedWhenAdvertised
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/system-event/collections: SystemEvent collections are checked only when advertised with itemType=SystemEvent (REQ-ETS-PART2-005, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-005-SYSTEM-EVENT-COLLECTIONS-001)

test-method.name: systemEventsCanonicalEndpointReadableWhenAvailable
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/system-event/canonical-endpoint: /systemEvents canonical resources endpoint is readable as JSON when provided (REQ-ETS-PART2-005, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-005-CANONICAL-ENDPOINT-001)

test-method.name: systemEventConformanceDeclared
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/system-event: /conformance declares /conf/system-event before System Events assertions run (REQ-ETS-PART2-005, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-005-SYSTEM-EVENT-CONFORMANCE-DECLARED-001)

test-method.name: systemEventPrerequisitesVisibleForFullClosure
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/system-event: full /conf/system-event closure is prerequisite-incomplete when /conf/api-common or Part 1 /conf/system is absent (REQ-ETS-PART2-005, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-005-DEPENDENCY-SKIP-001)

reporter-output.line: IUT declares /conf/system-event, /conf/api-common, and Part 1 /conf/system prerequisites.

test-method.name: systemScopedEventsEndpointUsesNormativePath
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/system-event/ref-from-system: System-scoped events use normative /systems/{sysId}/events path, not Annex A.43 alias evidence (REQ-ETS-PART2-005, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-005-SYSTEM-REF-ENDPOINT-001)

test-method.name: apiDefinitionResourceReturnsContent
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/oas30/oas-impl: api-definition resource resolves to HTTP 200 with non-empty body (REQ-ETS-CORE-004, SCENARIO-ETS-CORE-RESOURCE-SHAPE-001)

test-method.name: conformanceResourceShapeIsObject
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/landing-page/conformance-success: /conformance resource is a JSON object (REQ-ETS-CORE-004, SCENARIO-ETS-CORE-RESOURCE-SHAPE-001)

test-method.name: systemResourceOptionsPatchReadinessPrecondition
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/update/system: OPTIONS /systems/{systemId} advertises PATCH readiness; readiness-only, not update conformance PASS (REQ-ETS-PART1-011, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-011-UPDATE-SYSTEM-RESOURCE-OPTIONS-001)

test-method.name: systemsPatchLifecycleOptIn
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/update/system: when explicitly enabled against a dedicated mutable IUT, PATCH a temporary system resource (REQ-ETS-PART1-011, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-011-UPDATE-SYSTEM-PATCH-LIFECYCLE-OPTIN-001)

test-method.name: updateConformanceDeclared
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/update: /conformance declares /conf/update (REQ-ETS-PART1-011, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-011-UPDATE-CONFORMANCE-DECLARED-001)

test-method.name: updateDependencyCascadeRuntime
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/update: Update group runtime-cascade tracer for Update -> CreateReplaceDelete -> SystemFeatures -> Core (REQ-ETS-PART1-011, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-011-UPDATE-DEPENDENCY-SMOKE-001)

test-method.name: updateMutationSafetyGate
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/update: PATCH lifecycle tests are blocked unless mutation-tests-enabled=true and mutation-iut-policy=dedicated-mutable-iut (REQ-ETS-PART1-011, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-011-UPDATE-MUTATION-SAFETY-GATE-001)

test-method.name: datastreamCanonicalResourceReadable
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/datastream/canonical-url: selected Datastream is accessible through /datastreams/{id} canonical URL (REQ-ETS-PART2-002, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-002-DATASTREAM-ITEM-READONLY-001)

test-method.name: datastreamApiCommonPrerequisiteVisibleForFullClosure
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/datastream: full /conf/datastream closure is prerequisite-incomplete when /conf/api-common is absent (REQ-ETS-PART2-002, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-002-DEPENDENCY-SKIP-001)

reporter-output.line: IUT declares both /conf/datastream and /conf/api-common; full-class prerequisite is visible.

test-method.name: datastreamConformanceDeclared
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/datastream: /conformance declares /conf/datastream before Datastream assertions run (REQ-ETS-PART2-002, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-002-DATASTREAM-CONFORMANCE-DECLARED-001)

test-method.name: datastreamSchemaReadable
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/datastream/schema-op: selected Datastream exposes a readable /schema sub-resource (REQ-ETS-PART2-002, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-002-DATASTREAM-SCHEMA-ENDPOINT-001)

test-method.name: datastreamsCollectionReadable
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/datastream/resources-endpoint: /datastreams is a readable JSON resource collection (REQ-ETS-PART2-002, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-002-DATASTREAM-COLLECTION-READONLY-001)

test-method.name: observationCanonicalResourceReadableWhenCollectionPopulated
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/datastream/obs-canonical-url: selected Observation is accessible through /observations/{id} canonical URL when the collection is populated (REQ-ETS-PART2-002, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-002-OBSERVATION-ENDPOINTS-READONLY-001)

test-method.name: datastreamsCanonicalEndpointExposesDatastreamItems
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/datastream/canonical-endpoint: /datastreams canonical endpoint exposes Datastream resources (REQ-ETS-PART2-002, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-002-DATASTREAM-COLLECTION-READONLY-001)

test-method.name: observationEndpointsReadable
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/datastream/obs-resources-endpoint: /observations and /datastreams/{id}/observations are readable JSON endpoint collections (REQ-ETS-PART2-002, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-002-OBSERVATION-ENDPOINTS-READONLY-001)

test-method.name: observationsCanonicalEndpointReadable
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/datastream/obs-canonical-endpoint: /observations canonical endpoint is readable using the Observation resources endpoint test (REQ-ETS-PART2-002, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-002-OBSERVATION-ENDPOINTS-READONLY-001)

test-method.name: observationsReferenceSelectedDatastreamWhenNestedCollectionPopulated
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/datastream/obs-ref-from-datastream: Datastream-scoped Observation resources provide reference evidence when populated (REQ-ETS-PART2-002, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-002-OBSERVATION-REFERENCE-EVIDENCE-001)

test-method.name: systemScopedDatastreamsReadableWhenSystemReferencePresent
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/datastream/ref-from-system: selected Datastream's parent System exposes a Datastream sub-resource collection (REQ-ETS-PART2-002, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-002-SYSTEM-REFERENCE-READONLY-001)

test-method.name: systemsCollectionReturns200
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/system/resources-endpoint: GET /systems returns HTTP 200 (REQ-ETS-PART1-002, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-002-SYSTEMFEATURES-LANDING-001)

test-method.name: systemsCollectionHasItemsArray
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/system/resources-endpoint: /systems body has non-empty items array (REQ-ETS-PART1-002, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-002-SYSTEMFEATURES-LANDING-001)

test-method.name: systemsDiscoverableViaCollectionsOrLandingPage
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/system/collections: /systems is discoverable via /collections OR landing-page rel=systems link (REQ-ETS-PART1-002, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-002-SYSTEMFEATURES-COLLECTIONS-001)

test-method.name: systemsCollectionLinksDiscipline
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/system/canonical-url: /systems/{id} links contain rel=canonical; absence of rel=self is NOT FAIL (REQ-ETS-PART1-002, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-002-SYSTEMFEATURES-LINKS-NORMATIVE-001 — preserves v1.0 GH#3 fix)

test-method.name: systemItemHasIdTypeLinks
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/system/canonical-endpoint: GET /systems/{id} has id+type+links per base resource shape (REQ-ETS-PART1-002, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-002-SYSTEMFEATURES-RESOURCE-SHAPE-001)

test-method.name: systemItemHasGeometryOrValidTime
test-method.description: OGC-23-001 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-1/1.0/req/system/location-time: /systems/{id} has validTime OR geometry (REQ-ETS-PART1-002, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-002-SYSTEMFEATURES-LOCATION-TIME-001 — MAY-priority)

test-method.name: part2ApiCommonConformanceDeclared
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/api-common: /conformance declares /conf/api-common before Part 2 API Common assertions run (REQ-ETS-PART2-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-001-API-COMMON-CONFORMANCE-DECLARED-001)

test-method.name: part2ApiCommonResourceCollectionsReadable
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/api-common/resource-collection: discoverable Part 2 resource collections are readable JSON objects with items and links arrays (REQ-ETS-PART2-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-001-RESOURCE-COLLECTION-READONLY-001)

test-method.name: part2ApiCommonDependencyRuntime
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/api-common: Part 2 API Common tests are dependency-scoped to Core and Common and skip when /conf/api-common is undeclared (REQ-ETS-PART2-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-001-DEPENDENCY-SKIP-001)

reporter-output.line: Part 2 API Common group reached runtime after Core/Common prerequisites resolved.

test-method.name: part2ApiCommonResourceTerminology
test-method.description: OGC-23-002 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-connectedsystems-2/1.0/req/api-common/resources: landing-page Part 2 collection links use Connected Systems resource collection terminology (REQ-ETS-PART2-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART2-001-RESOURCE-TERMINOLOGY-001)

test-method.name: commonConformanceDeclaresCommonCore
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/landing-page/conformance-success: /conformance conformsTo declares OGC API Common Part 1 Core (REQ-ETS-PART1-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-001-COMMON-CONFORMANCE-001)

test-method.name: commonCollectionsEndpointReturnsCollectionsArray
test-method.description: OGC-20-024 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-2/0.0/req/collections/collections-list-success: /collections returns 200 with collections array (REQ-ETS-PART1-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-001-COMMON-COLLECTIONS-001)

test-method.name: commonLandingPageConformanceLinkHasJsonType
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/json/definition: landing-page rel=conformance link has type attribute identifying JSON (REQ-ETS-PART1-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-001-COMMON-LANDING-001)

test-method.name: commonContentNegotiationHonoursFJsonParameter
test-method.description: OGC-19-072 http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/req/json/content: GET /?f=json returns JSON (REQ-ETS-PART1-001, SCENARIO-ETS-PART1-001-COMMON-CONTENT-NEGOTIATION-001)
